calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Seal Records
Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DION ROBERTS MOTION'S Motion To Seal Records

Defendant's unopposed "motion to seal records" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. The submitted proposed order is to include the following: (1) Full title of the document to be sealed (2) Date of filing (3) Transaction number of the filed document.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
